recommendations.reason: Because you told us you want to improve team collaboration, we suggest "Building a High-Trust Team Culture".
recommendations.reason_detail: Your survey identified team collaboration as a priority. "Building a High-Trust Team Culture" covers exactly this — it's a practical, hands-on module you can apply directly to learn to give and receive feedback constructively.
